arn_prefix.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) prefix for the AWS Batch Job Definition.

container_orchestration_type.description: Specifies the type of container orchestration used for the AWS Batch job (e.g., ECS, EKS).

eks_properties.description: Details of the properties for AWS Batch jobs running on Amazon EKS, including pod configurations and container settings.

id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS Batch Job Definition.

node_properties.description: Configuration details for multi-node parallel jobs in AWS Batch, specifying node ranges and properties.

retry_strategy.description: Defines the retry strategy for failed AWS Batch jobs, including the number of attempts and exit conditions.

scheduling_priority.description: The priority assigned to the AWS Batch job, used for scheduling purposes.

tags.description: A set of tags associated with the AWS Batch Job Definition for organization and identification.

timeout.description: Specifies the timeout settings for the AWS Batch job, defining how long a job can run.
